name: Chocolate Mint Truffle Cake
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Semisweet chocolate, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Bourbon Creme Anglaise (recipe follows).
2. Melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler over low heat until the chocolate melts completely.
3. Whisk together sugar, egg yolks, and mint extract until light lemon color is achieved.
4. Add the mixture from step 3 to the melted chocolate and butter mixture. Stir until smooth.
5. Whip egg whites until they form soft peaks.
6. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
7. Pour the batter into a prepared, greased 9-inch springform pan.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
10. Dust with powdered sugar.
11. To serve, place a small amount of Bourbon Creme Anglaise on dessert plates.
12. Slice the cake into 8 wedges and place each slice on top of the sauce.
13. Garnish with mint sprigs if desired.
14. Serves 8.
